  these 10,000 files from one S3 to another S3. I can do it individually. I can
  take one file from here and put it here, then, I can take the second file. Then,
  I can take the third file, but it will consume a lot of time. It will also
  consume processing capability. It will also need a human intervention. Instead,
  what I do, I set up a batch process. So when you do copy, what is happening? You
  are invoking a batch process which does similar task on each of the file. What
  is each of the file out of 10,000 file? It takes up the first file and copies
  here. It takes a second file and copies here. Do you see a repeated task? Okay,

  what I do, I set up a batch process. So when you do copy, what is happening? You
